canonical_name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (Tamil Nadu)

local_names.ta: முதலமைச்சரின் முழு நல மருத்துவக் காப்பீட்டுத் திட்டம்
local_names.pa: ਮੁੱਖ ਮੰਤਰੀ ਵਿਆਪਕ ਸਿਹਤ ਬੀਮਾ ਯੋਜਨਾ (ਤਾਮਿਲਨਾਡੂ)

income_thresholds.description: Annual family income must be below Rs 72,000 for basic CMCHIS coverage (BPL/rice card holders)
Extended coverage for families with annual income up to Rs 1.2 lakh under revised 2022 norms

exclusion_rules.description: Any family member paying income tax disqualifies the household from CMCHIS
Families with employer-provided health insurance are excluded
Government employees and pensioners covered under separate TN government medical schemes are excluded
Families without a valid Tamil Nadu ration card are excluded; ration card is mandatory for enrollment
CMCHIS operates INDEPENDENTLY of PM-JAY; beneficiaries may hold both cards separately. No exclusion for PM-JAY holders.

family_criteria.family_definition: Family includes head of family, spouse, and up to 3 dependent children. Additional family members can be added by paying nominal premium. Coverage is floater across listed members.

covered_procedures: Cardiology (bypass surgery, valve replacement, angioplasty, pacemaker implant)
Orthopedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, spinal surgery, fracture fixation)
Neurosurgery (brain surgery, spinal cord procedures, craniotomy)
Ophthalmology (cataract surgery, glaucoma treatment, retinal procedures)
ENT surgeries (cochlear implant up to Rs 6.5 lakh additional)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC verification at empanelled hospital

required_documents.name: Ration Card (Tamil Nadu)
alternatives: Family Card issued by TN Civil Supplies
required_documents.notes: Must be a valid rice/sugar ration card issued by TN government. Income ceiling verified from this. Ration card is mandatory for CMCHIS enrollment.

required_documents.name: Income Certificate
required_documents.notes: Revenue department-issued income certificate if ration card alone does not confirm income below Rs 1.2 lakh

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: For OTP verification and scheme communication

required_documents.name: Family Photo
required_documents.notes: Required for new CMCHIS card generation at enrollment centre

enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility at cmchistn.com or call helpline 1800-425-3993 with ration card number
Step 2: Visit nearest empanelled hospital CMCHIS desk or CSC with Aadhaar and TN ration card
Step 3: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 4: Operator verifies ration card and income details against TN Civil Supplies database
Step 5: Family members added and photographs taken
Step 6: CMCHIS card generated; valid immediately for cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals
Step 7: For treatment, visit any CMCHIS-empanelled hospital in Tamil Nadu with CMCHIS card and Aadhaar
description_for_embedding: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CMCHIS) is Tamil Nadu's flagship state health insurance scheme providing Rs 5 lakh (Rs 500000) per family per year for hospitalization and surgical procedures. It covers families with annual income below Rs 1.2 lakh who hold valid Tamil Nadu ration cards. The scheme covers over 1090 medical and surgical procedures across major specialties including cardiology, oncology, orthopedics, neurosurgery, and nephrology at empanelled public and private hospitals across Tamil Nadu. CMCHIS operates INDEPENDENTLY of PM-JAY and co-exists as a separate state scheme; beneficiaries can hold both CMCHIS and Ayushman cards. Additional coverage of Rs 6.5 lakh available for cochlear implants. Free for eligible families with no premium payment required. Helpline: 1800-425-3993.
